title: Marketing Executive
description:
• Centrally located at Raffles Place
  • Hybrid Working Arrangement
  • Great Working Environment with growth opportunities


About the job:


We are looking for a creative and commercially minded Marketing Executive to manage campaigns across our large portfolio of global B2B events in a variety of industries, including Renewable Energy, Oil and Gas, Shared Services, Customer Experience, and Contact Centres.

IQPC provides business executives around the world with tailored practical conferences both online and physical, large-scale events and topical workshops, keeping them updated with industry trends, technological developments, and the regulatory landscape. IQPC leverages a global base of best practices to produce an unrivalled portfolio of conferences; our large-scale conferences are market-leading “must attend” events for their respective industries.


The company has a unique culture of empowerment and a strong belief in the personal development of employees at all levels of the business. See our website for further details: https://www.iqpc.com or https://careers-iqpc.com/our-culture/meet-our-people


Key responsibilities and accountabilities:


As a Marketing Executive, you will be responsible for the planning, implementation and execution of innovative B2B marketing campaigns, focusing on Digital Campaigns such as B2B social media strategies, management of PPC / advertising campaigns.


Responsibilities include:


· Creating and executing innovative digital marketing plans, deploying online direct marketing tactics

· Using a full range of online marketing tactics including social media, online PR & SEM

· Promoting tailored content to generate quality leads

· Formulating communications strategies, including persuasive copywriting

· Undertaking ongoing analysis of marketing campaigns to ensure targets for revenue and lead generation are met

· Working closely with internal departments to achieve project objectives

· Working with external vendors such as Media Partners to amplify marketing outreach

· Assisting with CRM systems to build qualified segments and schedule EDMs Oversee database growth through data mining services and market intelligence software


Required skills and competencies:


· Marketing or Communications Degree or equivalent work experience

· Fresh Graduates are welcome

· Exceptional interpersonal skills and a true team-player

· Excellent communicator, verbal and written

· Creative problem-solver, effective decision maker

· Outstanding organisational, prioritisation and multi-tasking skills

· Detail-focused and analytically inclined

· Self-driven, results-oriented, with a positive outlook

· Basic graphic designing experience using Canva or Photoshop is preferred

postedCompany.description:
IQPC is an international events business that specializes in the production, sales and delivery of B2B C-Level Conferences. Based in Robinson Road, our Singapore office is populated by a cosmopolitan mixture of multilingual and talented professionals. The office is active in most industry sectors, but particularly prominent in Shared Services and Finance, Infrastructure, Oil and Gas and Defence.

Fast paced, young and dynamic we promote a ‘work hard, play hard’ culture where employees are supported, developed and recognised for their contributions both as individuals and teams. 

“Identifying, developing and retaining talented staff is key to our success. The conference business is like no other environment, the pace and intensity is high but so are the rewards. Supporting our staff through training and incentives programs, plus promoting an inclusive and dynamic culture makes this an exciting place to work”. 

Liz Ong, Country Manager Singapore
postedCompany.name: IQPC WORLDWIDE PTE LTD
